overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a forest mountain trail. The scene transitions from clear partly cloudy weather to a heavy rainstorm as the character encounters other riders on horseback in the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the pine forest, approaching a rider on horseback

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback approaching from ahead and passing by on the right

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder formation beside the trail
dense forest of tall evergreen pine trees surrounding the path
distant mountain peaks visible through the forest canopy
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with grass edges
grass-covered slope rising on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest with clear skies and bright sunlight. Large rock outcrops and grassy hillsides flank the path while distant mountains are visible ahead. A rider on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail approaching mountain valley

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest trail alone after passing the rider

entered.detail: rocky outcrops and boulders scattered along the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking alone along the winding forest trail. The terrain becomes rockier as the path descends toward a valley. Tall pines line both sides of the trail with the mountain range still visible in the distance under partly cloudy skies.

events.description: heavy rain begins to fall suddenly, creating visible rain streaks and wet ground
scene darkens significantly as storm clouds obscure the sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the heavy rainstorm, approaching another rider visible ahead in the mist

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback waiting stationary on the path ahead in the rain

entered.detail: valley filled with fog and mist becoming visible through the rainfall
massive rock formation beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain begins to fall as the character descends into a misty valley, dramatically reducing visibility and darkening the scene. The trail becomes wet and muddy. Through the rain and fog, another rider on horseback becomes visible waiting ahead on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a bright, sunlit forest into a dark, rain-swept valley. It begins with the character walking a narrow dirt path through a dense pine forest under clear skies, passing a lone rider on horseback amidst large rock outcrops and grassy hills. As the camera continues along the winding trail, the terrain becomes rockier and the sky shifts to a partly cloudy state while descending toward a distant mountain range. The scene then plunges into a heavy rainstorm as the character enters a misty valley, causing the lighting to darken and the ground to turn wet and muddy. Finally, visibility drops sharply through the fog and rain, revealing another rider waiting ahead on the path.
